<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Our trusted storm shield mechanic and crackling companion: Mecha-Pop.</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString: V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale and Creative modes. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not not be used in Save the World mode.

Name.SourceString: <text color="CA92FFFF">Mecha-Pop</> <text color="FFFFFFFF">Challenges.</> <text color="FFFFFFFF">Earn up to 1,500 V-Bucks by completing </> <text color="CA92FFFF">Save the World </>  <text color="FFFFFFFF">daily quests.</> Challenges unlocked after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 3" mission in <text color="CA92FFFF">"Save the World" </>Campaign.
